description_long: This is a rectangular, horizontally oriented banner with a bold, modern design. The front face features a dark blue background bordered by a bright green edge, with the words 'Crypto Art' in large, contrasting white and red letters. Below the main title, a vivid green text reads 'HOLD AND PRESS SPACEBAR TO OPEN LINK', making the message highly visible from a distance. The sides and back of the banner are solid green, with no additional markings or features. The banner appears to be made from a lightweight, rigid material, likely plastic or foam, suitable for temporary or portable display. Its clean lines and simple construction suggest it is intended for quick setup in public or event spaces.
description: A rectangular, horizontally oriented banner with a dark blue face, green border, and bold 'Crypto Art' text, designed for high visibility in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full text and design, including the 'Crypto Art' title and green instruction text.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin, solid green edge of the banner with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the mirrored text and the same color scheme as the front, but reversed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing only the thin, solid green edge with no text.
